'''Ranjiyn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ansionian]] who was one of the seven delegates of the [[Unity Council]] on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] prior to the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He appeared to be the first among equals of the group, and dyed his [[Hair/Legends|hair]] in alternating black-and-white stripes.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
